subcodes.first_line: O ye beloved of the All-Merciful! Hearken unto the Call from the precincts of destiny - verily, there is no God but Him, the Most Resplendent [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا احباء الرحمن ان استمعوا الندآء من شطر القضاء انه لا اله الا هو البهی
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
